title: Typed scope/format/blocked-reason enums
description:
Introduce typed scope/format/blocked-reason enums (report stringly findings).

## Sites
- `main.rs:3394-3406` + `domain/queries.rs` — `query_blocked` formats `"dependency:…"`/`"gate:…"` strings that the CLI re-parses via `splitn(2,':')` with a silent `_ => Dependency` fallback. Return `Vec<(Issue, Vec<BlockingReason>)>` with a `BlockingReason { Dependency{…}, Gate{…} }` enum from `domain/queries.rs`; the CLI maps to its `BlockedReason` without splitting.
- `commands/document.rs:753-776` (`check_document_links`) — `scope == "all"` / `strip_prefix("issue:")` inline protocol. Introduce `DocumentScope { All, Issue(String) }` with `FromStr`, parse at the CLI call site, then match — mirroring the existing `SnapshotScope` pattern (`snapshot.rs:140-183`).
- `commands/graph.rs:172-185` (`export_graph(format: &str)`) — `format.to_lowercase()` match over dot/mermaid/json. Add a `GraphExportFormat` enum (clap `ValueEnum`) consumed directly so clap rejects bad input at parse time.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] `query_blocked` returns a typed `BlockingReason` enum from the domain; the CLI consumes it without re-parsing formatted strings, and the silent `_ => Dependency` fallback is gone.
- [ ] Document link-check scope is a `DocumentScope` enum with `FromStr` (mirroring `SnapshotScope`); no inline `== "all"`/`strip_prefix("issue:")` remains.
- [ ] Graph export format is a `GraphExportFormat` `ValueEnum`; an invalid format is rejected by clap at parse time, not via `to_lowercase()` matching.
- [ ] `cargo-ci` and `code-review` pass; CLI output and accepted inputs are unchanged for valid values.
